issue.title: www.365sb.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.365sb.com/#/HO/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.365sb.com%2F%23%2FHO%2F) ### Comment > 애드 가드 보호가 켜져 있으면 사이트 내부 자료를 불러올 수 없으나, 보호가 중지되면 내부 자료를 불러올 수 있습니다 ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/sdftj7q1nqscs8cow00k4w8ss0k4cgc8qqr9j8cxbo.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/r2sztnxx77kwcwcg0s4s4884csgkwwofxgok1jwd9k.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.8 (5279) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.26200.0` Browser: | Chrome License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | WFP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Russian filter,
AdGuard Japanese filter,
AdGuard Chinese filter,
List-KR Custom filters: | `User rules (url: none)` Tracking protection: | disabled DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.google/dns-query`
filters: `AdGuard DNS Filter`, `User rules (url: none)` Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | enabled Userscripts: | `AdGuard Assistant (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/assistant/4.3/assistant.user.js)`
`AdGuard Extra (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.user.js)`
`AdGuard Popup Blocker (url: https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/popup-blocker/2.5/popupblocker.user.js)` Userstyles: | disabled Other extensions used: | `Ahnlab V3, AdBlock` Referrer: | [https://www.365sb.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.365sb.com%2F) ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=win&product_version=7.22.8+%285279%29&system_version=Microsoft+Windows+NT+10.0.26200.0&browser=chrome&browser_detail=whale+4.37.378.12&filters=1.2.7.224.227&custom_filters=User%2520rules%2520%28url%253A%2520none%29&dns.servers=https%3A%2F%2Fdns.google%2Fdns-query&userscripts=AdGuard%2520Assistant%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fassistant%252F4.3%252Fassistant.user.js%29%252C%250AAdGuard%2520Extra%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.user.js%29%252C%250AAdGuard%2520Popup%2520Blocker%2520%28url%253A%2520https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fpopup-blocker%252F2.5%252Fpopupblocker.user.js%29&dns.filters=AdGuard%2520DNS%2520Filter%252C%250AUser%2520rules%2520%28url%253A%2520none%29&dns.filters_enabled=true&dns.enabled=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=true&stealth.enabled=false&stealth.webrtc=false&stealth.push=false&stealth.location=true&stealth.flash=false&stealth.java=false&stealth.strip_url=false&stealth.hide_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=false&stealth.disable_wap_push_message_routing_service=false&stealth.disable_windows_defender=false&stealth.disable_windows_telemetry=true&stealth.turn_off_advertising_id=true&referrer=https%253A%252F%252Fwww.365sb.com%252F&win.wfp=true&license_type=paid&scheme_version=2&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=0&dns.fallback_mode=System&stealth.disable_windows_recall=true)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://blogstyle.cafex.biz/posts/the-doctor-quietly-called-911-after-seeing-my-bruises-three-days-later-my-stepfather-was-led-away-in-handcuffs-while-my-mother-begged-for-forgiveness-jeslynvideoo](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fblogstyle.cafex.biz%2Fposts%2Fthe-doctor-quietly-called-911-after-seeing-my-bruises-three-days-later-my-stepfather-was-led-away-in-handcuffs-while-my-mother-begged-for-forgiveness-jeslynvideoo) ### Comment > This particular site has a very stubborn pop-up that you cannot close with a little x. I was able to get the pop up to be virtually empty using settings and add guard but even after I check pop-ups and saved and reloaded I still can't get rid of the empty pop up blocking the text. ### Screenshots

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: T: Social Widget
labels.description: Social widgets, share, like buttons and popups

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

issue.title: www.alipayhk.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.alipayhk.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alipayhk.com%2F)

### Comment
> When trying to use online electronic payments apps with adguard dns enable payments apps fail to work correctly. solution for the problem is to exclude all electronic payments apps to prevent issues from happening example payment apps failing to work or make transactions all completely.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/75w6ie6ds40ssogwkkgoo4kccwoc4kgdrs2jw6u754.jpg?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 2</summary>

  ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/jgptwdo2gtcgo8skw40kow8so0wsscglzn9427v3io.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/81g98ixlcgsgk408sgg40gwkw48sc4oq2fd9jd62bk.jpg?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 2 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/kkuus2w0vr44s4ks0googog4ww4ko083bj328tqmvy.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default
System version: | `Android 16`
Browser: | App itself

comment.body:
我的支付宝可以正常工作，不过加载速度确实变慢了。需要更多信息。  

不过这些截图说明了什么问题吗？看起来没有意义。
